message:
bench: update benchmark results after WASM unification

WASM now runs via wasmtime with unified entry point.
Key results:
- Binary: fib(40) 264ms, startup 4.6ms
- WASM: fib(40) 336ms (was 67000ms), startup 58.8ms
- Tail recursive: EdgeBox 87ms vs Bun 41760ms (476x faster)

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 | Runtime | Time |
 |:---|---:|
-| EdgeBox (Binary) | 12828.8ms |
+| EdgeBox (Binary) | 11299.6ms |
 | EdgeBox (AOT) | FAIL |
 | EdgeBox (WASM) | FAIL |
-| Bun | 505.0ms |
-| Node.js | 911.7ms |
+| Bun | 534.2ms |
+| Node.js | 940.6ms |

@@ -4,109 +4,109 @@
 
 | Command | Mean [ms] | Min [ms] | Max [ms] | Relative |
 |:---|---:|---:|---:|---:|
-| `EdgeBox (Binary)` | 9.2 ± 5.1 | 2.7 | 19.1 | 1.00 |
-| `EdgeBox (AOT)` | 375.8 ± 179.7 | 128.2 | 707.8 | 40.95 ± 30.19 |
-| `EdgeBox (WASM)` | 95.7 ± 50.3 | 66.6 | 234.7 | 10.42 ± 8.01 |
-| `Bun` | 20.4 ± 5.0 | 9.2 | 27.3 | 2.23 ± 1.36 |
-| `Node.js` | 40.5 ± 10.3 | 30.4 | 59.4 | 4.41 ± 2.72 |
+| `EdgeBox (Binary)` | 4.6 ± 0.4 | 4.1 | 5.4 | 1.00 |
+| `EdgeBox (AOT)` | 80.1 ± 6.3 | 71.9 | 92.8 | 17.29 ± 2.09 |
+| `EdgeBox (WASM)` | 58.8 ± 0.9 | 57.6 | 60.6 | 12.70 ± 1.18 |
+| `Bun` | 14.0 ± 1.0 | 11.8 | 15.3 | 3.03 ± 0.35 |
+| `Node.js` | 33.5 ± 1.3 | 31.2 | 35.1 | 7.24 ± 0.72 |
